accepted_human_dispositions.notes: Accepted from targeted VLM visual review evidence; operator disposition records the same visual acceptance under the watermarked-shard contract. Original VLM notes: Single-page question crop; text is fully legible, question boundary intact, no diagram/table required per question content; watermark present but does not impair legibility or completeness.

Operator override: targeted VLM rejected only because watermarked_source_pdf was present. VLM accepted question boundary=true, cross-page continuity=n/a. The watermarked-shard contract treats a watermark as a review reason, not an automatic blocker, when the question is complete and legible and the watermark does not occlude required content. Original VLM notes: Watermark present in source PDF (as indicated by review reason); question text is visually legible and complete on single page, with no diagram/table required per question content, but watermark violates policy for clean source material.

Accepted from targeted VLM visual review evidence; operator disposition records the same visual acceptance under the watermarked-shard contract. No diagram/table required per question text, so diagram_presence_accepted is true by default. Watermark present but does not impair legibility or content integrity.']
